case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4353.OO U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ROBERT THOMAS CONTINUED FROM APR-29-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAY-20-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302.
